1: Let me never be ashamed: deliver me in thy righteousness.
2: Be thou my strong rock, for an house of defence to save me.
3: Therefore for thy name's sake lead me, and guide me.
4: For thou art art my strength.
5: Thou hast redeemed me, O LORD LORD God of truth.
6: But I trust in the LORD LORD .
7: For thou hast considered my trouble; thou hast known my soul in adversities;
8: Thou hast set my feet in a large room.
9: Mine eye is consumed with grief, yea yea , my soul and my belly.
11: And a fear to mine acquaintance: they that did see me without fled from me.
12: I am like a broken vessel.
13: Fear was was on every side: while they took counsel together against me, They devised to take away my life.
14: I said, Thou art art my God.
15: Deliver me from the hand of mine enemies, and from them that persecute me.
16: Save me for thy mercies' sake.
17: Let the wicked be ashamed, and and let them be silent in the grave.
18: Which speak grievous things proudly and contemptuously against the righteous.
19: Which Which thou hast wrought for them that trust in thee before the sons of men!
20: Thou shalt keep them secretly in a pavilion from the strife of tongues.
21: For he hath shewed me his marvellous kindness in a strong city.
22: My supplications when I cried unto thee.
23: For For the LORD LORD preserveth the faithful, and plentifully rewardeth the proud doer.
24: All ye that hope in the LORD LORD .
